column1: # film_sources.tsv — the STANDING film/scheme analysts we ingest, made explicit (this is the
# "who do we pull film from" answer, formalized). brain_film.sh iterates rows with a channel_url and
# transcribes their recent uploads via brain_video.py, tagging each note analyst=<name> for provenance.
# handle              name                role                         channel_url (fill/confirm; blank = tweets-only for now)
brettkollmann         Brett Kollmann       All-22 film breakdown        https://www.youtube.com/@BrettKollmann
benjaminsolak         Ben Solak            film / scheme analyst
syedschemes           Syed Schemes         scheme + coverage film
mattharmon_byb        Matt Harmon          Reception Perception (route/alignment charting)
coachspeakindex       CoachSpeak Index     coaching-quote / scheme aggregation
yardspergretch        Ben Gretch           Stealing Signals film-signal (ingested via Substack, not video)
nextgenstats          NFL Next Gen Stats   tracking data (charts, ingested via tweets)
fantasyptsdata        FantasyPoints Data   charting (tweets + FP Data Suite pulls)
